scripts.buildMonaco: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter ./monaco run build
scripts.buildVSCode: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter ./vscode run packagePlugin
scripts.buildPlugins: pnpm run buildMonaco && pnpm run buildVSCode
scripts.compile: pnpm --filter ./shared run compile && pnpm --filter ./vscode run compile
scripts.test: pnpm run compile && pnpm run --filter ./* test --if-present
scripts.vscode: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter ./vscode run vscode
scripts.monaco: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter ./monaco run dev
